# MuleSoft Jira Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.2) of Jira Connector documentation.
> See [Jira Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jira-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Jira Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Jira Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jira-connector/latest/index.md)

- [Jira Connector 1.2 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/jira-connector/latest/jira-connector-xml-maven.md)
